app.title: Malaysia Personal Income Tax Calculator
app.subtitle: Calculate your Malaysian personal income tax easily — Year of Assessment (YA) 2025
app.documentTitle: Malaysia Personal Income Tax Calculator — YA 2025

common.additionalReliefPerChildStudying: Additional {{amount}} relief per disabled child studying (diploma or above)

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.body1: This tax calculator is an unofficial tool and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Lembaga Hasil Dalam Negeri (LHDN) or Inland Revenue Board of Malaysia. It is developed independently based on publicly available tax information.
disclaimer.body2: While we strive to maintain accuracy, this calculator should be used for estimation purposes only. For official tax matters and accurate calculations, please:

taxpayer.childThresholdNote: Different tax thresholds apply based on number of children
taxpayer.nonTaxableThreshold: Non-taxable threshold for this assessment: RM{{amount}}
taxpayer.belowThreshold: Your current income is at or below this threshold, so you can skip the remaining relief pages and go straight to the result.
taxpayer.childrenBelow18: Number of Unmarried Children and Below 18
taxpayer.childrenAbove18PreU: Number of Unmarried Children 18+ in Pre-U / A-Level / Certificate / Matriculation
taxpayer.childrenAbove18Higher: Number of Unmarried Children 18+ in Diploma / Degree / Higher Education
taxpayer.disabledChildrenStudying: Number of Unmarried Disabled Children (18+ in Education)

contributions.title: Mandatory Contributions
contributions.lifeInsuranceHelper: Shares RM{{amount}} sub-limit with EPF Additional Voluntary Contribution

reliefs.seriousDiseasesHelper: Combined limit of {{amount}} (includes vaccination & dental below)
reliefs.medicalCheckup: Medical Check-up, COVID-19 Testing & Self-Health Monitoring (RM)
reliefs.medicalCheckupHelper: Shares combined {{amount}} limit with mental health below
reliefs.mentalHealthHelper: Shares combined {{amount}} limit with medical check-up above
reliefs.basicSupporting: Basic Supporting Equipment for Disabled Self/Spouse/Child/Parent (RM)
reliefs.deferredAnnuity: Deferred Annuity and Private Retirement Scheme (PRS) (RM)
reliefs.evCharging: EV Charging Facilities & Domestic Food Waste Composting Machine (RM)
reliefs.housingLoanNote: For S&P agreements from 1 Jan 2025 to 31 Dec 2027
reliefs.tier1: House price up to RM500,000 (relief up to RM7,000)
reliefs.tier2: House price RM500,001 - RM750,000 (relief up to RM5,000)
reliefs.zakatHelper: Applied as a tax rebate, capped by the tax charged
reliefs.donationsHelper: Deduction capped at 10% of aggregate income in this calculator

threshold.single: You won't be taxed if your annual employment income is {{amount}} and below.
threshold.withChildren_zero: Under {{assessment}} with no children, you won't be taxed if your annual employment income is {{amount}} and below.
threshold.withChildren_one: Under {{assessment}} with one child, you won't be taxed if your annual employment income is {{amount}} and below.
threshold.withChildren_other: Under {{assessment}} with two or more children, you won't be taxed if your annual employment income is {{amount}} and below.

mtd.title: Monthly Tax Deduction (PCB/MTD)
mtd.important: Important: Selecting this option does not affect your tax calculation in this calculator.
mtd.body: Monthly Tax Deduction (MTD/PCB) is relevant for your actual tax filing with LHDN:
mtd.item1: Since 2014, if you have MTD and meet certain criteria, you can choose not to file a tax return
mtd.item2: In this case, your MTD will be considered your final tax
mtd.item3: However, if you want to claim additional reliefs, you must submit a tax return
mtd.item5: LHDN can still raise additional assessments upon receiving your return
mtd.note: This calculator only estimates your total tax liability based on income and reliefs. Your actual tax payment will depend on your MTD amounts and LHDN's assessment.
